# V2 retention — matured cohort read

## TL;DR

V2 sits at +0.4pp on the headline metric over the matured cohort, with
a 95% CI of [−0.05pp, +0.85pp]. The result has not yet crossed the
pre-registered 0.05 threshold; we plan to revisit at week 8.

## Body

| arm | rate | delta | CI |
|---|---|---|---|
| control | 31.2% | — | — |
| V2 | 31.6% | +0.4pp | [−0.05, +0.85] |

The +0.4pp delta is consistent across the three segment cuts we
checked (within ±0.1pp of the pooled figure each).

## Methodology

Matured cohort defined as members past the full conversion window on
the day of the read. Two-sided z-test on a pooled proportion.

## What we do not know yet

We have not yet decomposed the result by retention deal segment.
